mapper.select: SELECT * FROM todo WHERE shared_with LIKE '%' || #{userId} || '%' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo (id, title, description, completed, tags, priority, is_favorite, is_archived, is_deleted, deleted_at, due_date, reminder, location_lat, location_lng, location_address, schedule_repeat, schedule_end_date, owner_id, shared_with, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{description}, #{completed}, #{tags, typeHandler=xyz.crearts.note.keeper.mapper.typehandler.StringListTypeHandler}, #{priority}, #{favorite}, #{archived}, #{deleted}, #{deletedAt}, #{dueDate}, #{reminder}, #{location.lat, jdbcType=REAL}, #{location.lng, jdbcType=REAL}, #{location.address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{schedule.repeat, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{schedule.endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ownerId}, #{sharedWith}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE todo SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, completed = #{completed}, tags = #{tags, typeHandler=xyz.crearts.note.keeper.mapper.typehandler.StringListTypeHandler}, priority = #{priority}, is_favorite = #{favorite}, due_date = #{dueDate}, reminder = #{reminder}, location_lat = #{location.lat, jdbcType=REAL}, location_lng = #{location.lng, jdbcType=REAL}, location_address = #{location.address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, schedule_repeat = #{schedule.repeat, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, schedule_end_date = #{schedule.endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE todo SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE todo SET is_archived = 1, updated_at = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM todo WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at <= #{end}

SELECT * FROM todo WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (title LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR description LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%') AND tags LIKE '%' || #{tags} || '%' AND priority = #{priority} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM todo WHERE reminder IS NOT NULL AND reminder <= #{now} AND (notified_at IS NULL OR notified_at < reminder) AND is_deleted = 0 AND is_archived = 0 ORDER BY reminder ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE todo SET notified_at = #{notifiedAt}, updated_at = #{notifiedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE todo SET shared_with = #{sharedWith}, updated_at = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = #{id}
